description: A low pressure chemical vapor deposition (LPCVD) system for depositing polysilicon films from silane (SiH4) gas at controlled temperatures and pressures.

components.name: process_tube
components.role: contains wafers during deposition process and provides controlled atmosphere
components.evidence: horizontal tube furnace with wafer boat positioning system

operating_ranges.evidence: Tube exchange required when deposition reaches approximately 20 microns
Initial insertion temperature: 300°C - 400°C for 1-2 hours
Ramp-up cycle: 300°C/hr

degradation_mechanisms.rate_description: depends on particle additions during processing
degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Tube exchange required when deposition reaches approximately 20 microns. Timing strongly depends on particle additions during processing
If particles exceed specifications, tube should be exchanged

fault_conditions.name: excessive_deposition
fault_conditions.description: deposition thickness reaches approximately 20 microns requiring tube exchange
fault_conditions.evidence: Tube exchange required when deposition reaches approximately 20 microns

fault_conditions.name: particle_contamination
fault_conditions.description: particles exceed specifications requiring tube exchange
fault_conditions.evidence: If particles exceed specifications, tube should be exchanged

maintenance_actions.name: tube_change
maintenance_actions.evidence: Tube exchange required when deposition reaches approximately 20 microns

maintenance_actions.name: pre_cleaning_hf_treatment
maintenance_actions.evidence: 1:10 HF/DI-water ratio for 2-3 minutes. Rinse in DI-water, dry with dry nitrogen

maintenance_actions.name: fiberfax_wool_repacking
maintenance_actions.evidence: after every tube change, if a gap exists between the process tube and the adapter, it must be repacked with fiberfax wool This will prevent air movement within the furnace and resultant temperature cycling

assumptions.statement: Process tube operates in controlled atmosphere during deposition
assumptions.reason: Component role states it provides controlled atmosphere and manual shows gas flow controls and process recipes

assumptions.statement: Tube degradation is primarily from material deposition rather than thermal cycling
assumptions.reason: Manual emphasizes deposition thickness as primary driver for tube exchange

components.name: heating_zones
components.role: provides controlled temperature profile across the process tube
components.evidence: Zone1 610.0 °C Slope 10.00 °C/min Zone2 610.0 °C Slope 10.00 °C/min Zone3 610.0 °C Slope 10.00 °C/min

operating_ranges.evidence: Kanthal® AF Maximum Temperatures: RAC: 1,300°C (2,370°F), ROB: 1,300°C (2,370°F)
Kanthal® APM Maximum Temperatures: FIBROTHAL® MEANDER SYSTEM II: 1,350°C (2,460°F), FIBROTHAL® MEANDER SYSTEM III: 1,350°C (2,460°F)
Maximum Element Temperature: 1,150°C (2,100°F) for embedded systems
Cold resistance of 9.42 Ω for PAS 750/450/230 module
Hot resistance is approximately 4% higher, equal to 9.8 Ω
Electrical resistance: Rk ± 5%
5,400 W at 230 V supply voltage for PAS 750/450/230
Converted to eurovoltage standard (400/230 V) in brochure

degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Hot resistance is approximately 4% higher, equal to 9.8 Ω
iron oxide scale can damage Kanthal® heating elements, use a protective cover
Does not withstand sulphur pentoxide
Attacks all types of resistance alloys

fault_conditions.name: heating_element_failure
fault_conditions.description: heating element requires replacement
fault_conditions.evidence: After installation of the new heating element, follow the start-up instructions

fault_conditions.name: electrical_bridge_formation
fault_conditions.description: vapours form condensates from salts or oxides creating electrical bridges
fault_conditions.evidence: Vapours must not form condensates from salts or oxides, otherwise electrical bridges will be formed

fault_conditions.name: power_terminal_fracture
fault_conditions.description: stresses can fracture the lead at the element weld
fault_conditions.evidence: This action is necessary to preclude stresses can fracture the lead at the element weld

maintenance_actions.name: heating_element_replacement
maintenance_actions.what_it_resets: heating element functionality and temperature control
maintenance_actions.evidence: Lift out the heating element, After installation of the new heating element, follow the start-up instructions

maintenance_actions.name: power_terminal_connection
maintenance_actions.evidence: Connect the bolts on the heating element. This must be done very carefully! Use two box-end wrenches when tightening the bolts

assumptions.statement: Temperature factor influencing heating resistance is negligible in power calculations
assumptions.reason: heating element alloy, Kanthal® A-1, results in a maximum resistance increase of only 4%

assumptions.statement: Modules can be operated at lower voltages for reduced power requirements
assumptions.reason: Modules can be operated at lower voltages if low power required

components.name: boat_loader
components.role: moves wafer boat in and out of process tube
components.evidence: Boat to 2000.0 mm at 300.0 mm/min with oscillation speed of 0.0 mm/min

operating_ranges.evidence: Boat to 10.0 mm at 300.0 mm/min
Boat to 2000.0 mm at 300.0 mm/min
Boat to 2000.0 mm at 300.0 mm/min with oscillation speed of 0.0 mm/min
with oscillation speed of 0.0 mm/min

fault_conditions.name: door_not_closed
fault_conditions.description: Door closure status monitoring for safe operation
fault_conditions.evidence: Alarm on digital in doorclsd[3] = OFF

fault_conditions.name: boat_position_timeout
fault_conditions.description: Boat fails to reach setpoint position within expected time
fault_conditions.symptoms: Wait for boat to reach setpoint fails
fault_conditions.evidence: Wait for boat to reach setpoint

assumptions.statement: The boat loader operates in a cleanroom environment with laminar flow
assumptions.reason: Manual mentions cleanroom placement and horizontal laminar flow for particle prevention

assumptions.statement: Boat loader has safety interlocks with door position
assumptions.reason: Recipe shows door closure monitoring and alarm conditions tied to boat operations

assumptions.statement: Boat loader supports wafer boat oscillation capability
assumptions.reason: Recipe parameters include oscillation speed settings, though typically set to 0.0 mm/min

components.name: vacuum_pump
components.role: evacuates process tube and maintains low pressure environment
components.evidence: MAINVAC[16] = ON and EVACUATE steps in process recipe

operating_ranges.evidence: Ambient temperature range (operation): 12 to 40°C
Normal surface temperature of the pump-body at ultimate vacuum (operation) ambient temperature of 20°C: 45 to 65°C
Maximum permitted outlet pressure (at full pump throughput): 0.5 bar gauge 1.5 bar absolute 1.5 x 10⁵ Pa
Ultimate vacuum without gas-ballast (partial pressure): ranges from 2.5 x 10⁻⁴ mbar to 3 x 10⁻² mbar depending on model
Motor rotational speed: 50 Hz electrical supply: 1450
Motor rotational speed: 60 Hz electrical supply: 1750

degradation_mechanisms.evidence: The oil in the pump should be clear; if the oil is cloudy or discoloured, it is contaminated with process vapours

degradation_mechanisms.driven_by: corrosive or abrasive gases and vapours
degradation_mechanisms.evidence: More frequent maintenance required for pumps processing corrosive or abrasive gases and vapours - Recommendation: Replace pump seals every year under corrosive/abrasive conditions
If the motor fan-cover is not kept clean, the air-flow over the motor can be restricted and the pump may overheat

fault_conditions.name: motor_overheating
fault_conditions.description: Motor overheats due to restricted air-flow
fault_conditions.evidence: If the motor fan-cover is not kept clean, the air-flow over the motor can be restricted and the pump may overheat

fault_conditions.name: oil_contamination
fault_conditions.description: Oil becomes cloudy or discoloured from process vapours
fault_conditions.symptoms: cloudy or discoloured oil visible in sight-glass
fault_conditions.evidence: The oil in the pump should be clear; if the oil is cloudy or discoloured, it is contaminated with process vapours

fault_conditions.name: motor_electrical_failure
fault_conditions.description: Motor fails electrical safety tests
fault_conditions.symptoms: earth continuity greater than 0.1 Ω or insulation resistance less than 10 MΩ
fault_conditions.evidence: Earth continuity: less than 0.1 Ω, Insulation resistance: greater than 10 MΩ - If the motor fails these tests, you must replace the motor

maintenance_actions.name: check_oil_level
maintenance_actions.evidence: Check the oil-level: As required, at least monthly

maintenance_actions.name: replace_oil
maintenance_actions.evidence: Replace the oil: 3000 operation hours

maintenance_actions.name: clean_motor_fan_cover
maintenance_actions.evidence: Clean the motor fan-cover: Yearly

maintenance_actions.name: clean_and_overhaul_pump
maintenance_actions.evidence: Clean and overhaul the pump: 15000 operation hours

maintenance_actions.name: fit_new_blades
maintenance_actions.evidence: Fit new blades: 30000 operation hours

maintenance_actions.name: decontaminate_oil
maintenance_actions.evidence: Operate the pump until the oil is clear when oil is cloudy or discoloured

assumptions.statement: Gas-ballast operation is used when pumping condensable vapours
assumptions.reason: Manual specifies to use gas-ballast when there is high proportion of condensable vapours

assumptions.statement: Oil sight-glass provides accurate indication of oil level and condition
assumptions.reason: Maintenance procedures rely on visual inspection of oil through sight-glass

typical 0.7 bar to 2.75 bar the specified full scale flow rate will be achieved

degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Filters are clogged
Valve sticking, clogged, contaminated, corroded

fault_conditions.evidence: any severe error condition

maintenance_actions.evidence: Replace filter

components.name: pressure_control_valve

Maximum Inlet Pressure: 150 psig

fault_conditions.description: unit does not achieve full flow rate

maintenance_actions.evidence: Recommended: Annual maintenance and recalibration at MKS service center if nothing else specified

assumptions.reason: Manual describes 'solenoid driven valve' and 'Controlling flow is done by levitating the valve plug from the valve orifice'

fault_conditions.evidence: Earth continuity: less than 0.1 Ω, Insulation resistance: greater than 10 MΩ - If the motor fails these tests, you must replace the motor

fault_conditions.description: Continuous looped process recipe needs reset
fault_conditions.symptoms: Process stuck in loop, cannot select another recipe
fault_conditions.evidence: continuous looped process recipe needs to be reset to Step 0 to allow selection of another process recipe

maintenance_actions.name: stop_process_recipe
maintenance_actions.what_it_resets: Stops timer while maintaining all given commands
maintenance_actions.evidence: When activated, the 'Stop' command will stop the timer while all given commands are maintained

maintenance_actions.name: abort_process_recipe
maintenance_actions.evidence: continuous looped process recipe needs to be reset to Step 0 to allow selection of another process recipe

maintenance_actions.name: start_continue_process_recipe
maintenance_actions.what_it_resets: Starts from Step 0 or continues from stopped state
maintenance_actions.evidence: starting a newly selected process recipe so it starts running from Step 0 or starting a process recipe that has been stopped or is waiting for an 'Operator' instruction

assumptions.statement: Process controller manages sequential recipe execution with safety interlocks
assumptions.reason: Manual shows detailed recipe steps with safety checks, operator confirmations, and abort capabilities

assumptions.statement: Controller maintains state during stop operations
assumptions.reason: Stop command stops timer while all given commands are maintained
